understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' in each level. In the level experienced, there was a goal at [35, 17] and a piece starting near [12, 24]. I needed to move the piece to that goal, but my attempts failed repeatedly.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A click on an empty valid floor tile moves the currently selected piece to that tile if the path is clear. Obstacles and walls block movement, causing clicks to fail (piece stays). Cardinal direction moves (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) also move the piece one tile in that direction if not blocked. Each action consumes a step, and the level ends when steps reach 0 or the goal condition is met. There can be only one selectable piece active at a time here.
